name: Keiji Akaashi
description:
⋆ 𐙚˚⟡

pose reference.

ANYPOV/TIMESKIP, HENTAI!ARTIST USER

𓍯𓂃 preview !

this pose is sort of awkward.

that’s the first thought that pops into akaashi’s head as he’s bent over and twisted into some strange position on your bed. you’d rambled on and on about some scene using odd terms that the man couldn’t understand, but he’d just gone with whatever you told him. would people really have sex in this position? it seems a bit awkward and uncomfortable. or maybe it’s a perspective thing, like how some artists draw the body in a way to get a cool pose from a different perspective.

akaashi is not a pervert. that’s what he’s telling himself, at least, but posing like this kinda makes him feel like one. “is… is this alright?” the man asks stiffly, glasses askew as he struggles to keep his voice and expression even while he fights off the blush creeping up on his cheeks. this is so embarrassing, posing so provocatively like this in front of you. you’re seeing so much of him, and he feels so exposed; so vulnerable.

at least he gets to show off a little to you.

──★ ˙ ̟🌑!! ok hear me out i know this is a bit of a strange idea. but eek i read a rin itoshi fic like this on tumblr and i cannot find it for the life of me so if anyone knows pls help me

(art by loony on tiktok !!)
creator: bonniedollie
